titles.title: Oh, I Want To Know You More

properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Just the time I feel that I've been caught In the mire of self, Just the time I feel my mind's been bought By worldly wealth; That's when the breeze begins to blow, I know the Spirit's call; And all my worldly wonderings Just melt into His Love.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Oh, I want to know You more, Deep within my soul I want to know You, Oh, I want to know You. To feel Your heart and know Your mind, Looking in Your eyes, stirs up within me Cries that say, "I want to know You," Oh, I want to know You more.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: When my daily deeds ordinarily Lose life and song, My heart begins to bleed, Sensitivity to Him is gone; I've run the race, but set my pace, And faced a shattered soul, But the gentle arms of Jesus Warmed my hungering to be whole.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Oh, I want to know You more, Deep within my soul I want to know You, Oh, I want to know You. And I would give my final breath, To know You in Your death and resurrection Oh, I want to know You more Oh, I want to know You more Oh, I want to know You more
